\tzpentry{ID4577}{Magnetic Field}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4577 introduces Magnetic Field as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \mathbf{B}(t) = \int_0^{t} \dot{\mathbf{B}}_{\text{ramp}} dt \implies \mathbf{B}_{\text{target}} \approx 0.1 \text{ Tesla} \end{equation}
